short_reason: Technically solid, well-structured article with strong keyword integration (title matches keyword 'JWT none algorithm attack'). Code examples are specific and actionable, the RS256-to-HS256 confusion and kid injection sections add breadth, and the testing methodology section (jwt_tool, Burp Suite, Nuclei) is a standout practical addition. The checklist and conclusion are strong. Recommend minor polish only.
red_flags: The article could benefit from a brief opening hook or real-world breach stat to replace the generic introduction
The 'jwt_tool' command examples could include installation instructions for non-technical readers
The Nuclei YAML snippet has a commented-out base64 encoding that may render ambiguously
